name: worldwright
description: Interactive hex map editor for world-building

scripts.dev: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npx electron-vite dev"
scripts.start: powershell -Command "Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npx electron-vite preview"
